function.name: natural_language_query_v1_query_post
function.description:
Natural Language Query

Execute a natural language query against the data platform.

The query engine translates natural language to SQL, executes it,
and returns structured results. Designed for LLM tool-use.

Example:
    POST /v1/query {"question": "Top 5 products by revenue today"}

question.title: Question
examples: What is the average order value in the last hour?

function.name: get_entity_v1_entity__entity_type___entity_id__get
function.description:
Get Entity

Look up a specific entity by type and ID.

Supported entity types: order, user, product, session.
Returns the latest known state of the entity.

Example:
    GET /v1/entity/order/ORD-20260401-7829

function.name: get_metric_v1_metrics__metric_name__get
function.description:
Get Metric

Get a real-time metric value.

Supported metrics: revenue, order_count, avg_order_value, conversion_rate,
active_sessions, error_rate.

Window options: 5m, 15m, 1h, 6h, 24h.

Example:
    GET /v1/metrics/revenue?window=1h

function.name: stream_events_v1_stream_events_get
function.description:
Stream real-time validated events via SSE

Server-Sent Events stream of validated pipeline events.

function.name: catalog_v1_catalog_get
function.description:
Catalog

List available entities, metrics, and streaming sources for agents.

function.name: health_v1_health_get
function.description:
Health

Pipeline health check — agents should call this before answering time-sensitive queries.

Returns overall pipeline status and per-component health.
If status != "healthy", agents should caveat their answers with data freshness warnings.
